modules.name: vabene.bond.factories.random_bond_factory.random_bond_factory
documentation:
Random Bond Factory
===================

classes.name: vabene.bond.factories.random_bond_factory.random_bond_factory.RandomBondFactory

methods.name: vabene.bond.factories.random_bond_factory.random_bond_factory.RandomBondFactory.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a {class}`.RandomBondFactory` instance.

# Parameters

max_internal_bonds

: Once all atoms have been connected into a single molecule,
  the factory will create a random number of internal bonds
  between atoms in the molecule. This sets the maximum number
  of such bonds.

required_bonds

: Bonds, which must be yielded by each
  {meth}`~.BondFactory.get_bonds` call.

max_bond_order

: The maximum bond order the factory can make. If
  `None` the maximum will be the maximum shared valence
  between the two atoms.

random_seed

: The random seed to use.

Creates random collections of bonds.

The bonds yielded will not necessarily create a single molecule.

methods.name: vabene.molecule.molecule.Molecule.get_atoms

Yield the atoms of the molecule.

# Parameters

  be an {class}`int`, if only one atom should

documentation:

: The ids of bonds which should be yielded. Can be an

{class}`.Bond`

: A bond of the molecule.

methods.name: vabene.molecule.molecule.Molecule.get_num_bonds
documentation:

modules.name: vabene.atom.factories.random_atom_factory
documentation:
Random Atom Factory
===================

classes.name: vabene.atom.factories.random_atom_factory.RandomAtomFactory

methods.name: vabene.atom.factories.random_atom_factory.RandomAtomFactory.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a {class}`.RandomAtomFactory`.

# Parameters

atoms

: The atoms, which are randomly selected, with replacement,
  in each {meth}`~.RandomAtomFactory.get_atoms` call.

num_atoms

: The number of atoms which should be yielded in each
  {meth}`~.RandomAtomFactory.get_atoms` call.

required_atoms

: Atoms, which must be yielded in each
  {meth}`~.RandomAtomFactory.get_atoms` call.

random_seed

: The random seed to use.
Creates a random collection of atoms.
